message:
Switch health probe from SELECT 1 to SELECT active_branch()

Per Tim Sehn (Dolt CEO): active_branch() is a lightweight probe that
does not block behind queued queries, unlike SELECT 1 which goes through
the full query executor. Updated in daemon health check, doltserver
MeasureQueryLatency, and metric descriptions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
